============================================================
TODAY'S WORK SUMMARY
============================================================
- Implemented end-to-end config approval flow improvements across GC/RC/LC.
- Added message types for execution loop: EXECUTION_INSTRUCTION and EXECUTION_RESULT.
- Implemented RC->GC HIGH proposal escalation path and RC->LC execution dispatch.
- Implemented LC execution instruction handling + execution result reporting.
- Added/expanded controller flow tests in tests/test_config_approval_controllers.py.
- Fixed approval persistence compatibility with NIB store APIs.
- Fixed execution token secret alignment across RC/LC/GC.
- Added lock lifecycle handling in RC (acquire/deny/release on terminal/failure paths).
- Added richer transaction logs for GC/RC/LC approval/execution handoffs.
- Investigated and resolved distributed runtime startup failure (SQLite disk I/O) caused by permissions in sim_distributed.
- Enabled message signing in distributed runtime scripts (GC/RC/LC) using MessageAuthenticator.
- Verified signed traffic in logs after restart.
- Added topology env wiring for PDSNO_MESSAGE_SIGNING_SECRET.
- Fixed GC region derivation expression for clarity and precedence safety.
